title: rubus exaltatus var. plicatus
intro: Rubus exaltatus var. plicatus is a specific variety of the Rubus genus, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, a type of bramble plant that is native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus exaltatus var. plicatus include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
